hero.headline: Your shop's marketing — done in 3 taps.
hero.subheadline: Upload your WhatsApp chat once. Nukkad writes your festival posts, manages your customers, and tells you who to message today.

features.title: Everything your shop needs
features.subtitle: No marketing degree needed. No expensive tools. Just your phone.

festival.title: Festival Calendar
festival.desc: Navratri in 8 days? Your posts are already waiting for you — written for your shop, your city.

ai.title: AI Post Writer
ai.desc: Pick a festival and a customer group. Nukkad writes 3 caption options in seconds. You just pick one.

crm.title: Customer Groups
crm.desc: Nukkad sorts your customers automatically — who buys regularly, who hasn't been back, who has a birthday coming.

advisor.title: Budget Advisor
advisor.desc: Before you spend on a boosted post, Nukkad tells you the right time, audience, and amount for your city.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when it's working.

home.postScheduled: Scheduled for this evening at 6 PM
home.broadcastNudge: loyal customers haven't heard from you in 3 weeks.

crm.title: Customers
crm.subtitle: opted in for messages
crm.importDesc: Nukkad will figure out who your best customers are — who buys regularly, who hasn't been back.
crm.privacyNote: Your chats are never stored — we only extract signals, messages are never saved.
crm.noContacts: No customers in this group yet.

create.title: Create Post
create.subtitle: AI writes the draft, you decide.
create.productHint: e.g. new saree collection, 20% Navratri sale...
create.aiWritingDesc: Writing Navratri captions for your loyal customers
create.chooseCaption: Choose one — you can edit it too:
create.scheduleDesc: Best time for your customers is pre-selected
create.doneDesc: Post scheduled — it will be sent automatically

settings.title: Settings
settings.planDesc: Free plan: 5 AI posts/month · 30-day calendar · Basic customer list
settings.privacyDesc: Your data is stored in India (AWS Mumbai). Phone numbers are encrypted. WhatsApp chat content is never saved.
